_fork_membership_note: This record declares the exact eligible workflow members of the packet. Control-plane artifacts are present in the fixture directory but are explicitly excluded by membership_eligibility_rule. Fork does not silently add or remove eligible workflow members. A reviewer can independently enumerate eligible artifacts and compare them with this declaration.
_fork_completeness_claim: NOT_CLAIMED. This packet boundary covers observed workflow event artifacts. It does not claim to be a complete record of all activity that may have occurred in connection with the referenced synthetic subject.

membership_eligibility_rule.enumeration_method: Scan PUBLIC_REFERENCE_FIXTURE/*.json, classify by _fork_artifact_class, compare all eligible workflow artifacts against declared_members.
